opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I had a big steak for dinner, and an hour later this awful, gripping pain started under my right ribs and shot into my shoulder.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on after dinner and it has been really severe for a few hours — I've been pacing and can't get comfortable, and I've thrown up twice. I want something for the pain and to know if I'm safe to stay home tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 45 minutes to an hour after a heavy, fatty dinner (a big steak)
symptom_narrative.duration: severe for about 3 hours; it is now starting to ease off a little
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, gripping ache — like something is clenching under my right ribs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it was about 8 out of 10 at its worst, the worst pain I've had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: under my right ribs, and it shoots through to my right shoulder blade
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it has been fairly constant rather than coming in waves, and it has now started to plateau
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has really helped; I took two paracetamol a couple of hours ago and it barely touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing in particular — I can't lie still, I keep getting up and pacing to try to find a position that helps
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel really nauseous and I've vomited twice; I feel a bit sweaty. I don't feel feverish, I haven't had any shivers or chills, and I haven't noticed any yellowing of my skin or eyes.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm too distressed by the pain to settle, but I can still get around the house on my own

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took two tablets about 2 hours ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home tonight with a supportive spouse who is present and helping

objective_data_offered.value: she keeps getting up and pacing the room, can't stay still or lie down, shifting position constantly trying to get comfortable
she looks a bit sweaty and clammy and is clearly uncomfortable
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's visual impression, not a measurement
